title: The African Development Fund Act, 1982
full_text: The African Development Fund Act, 1982 अफ्रीकी विकास निधि अधिनियम, 1982 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198201 Act Number: 01 Enactment Date: 1982-03-04 Act Year: 1982 Short Title: The African Development Fund Act, 1982 Hindi Title: अफ्रीकी विकास निधि अधिनियम, 1982 Long Title: An Act to implement the African Development Fund Agreement and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Economic Affairs Enforcement Date: 25-08-1986 Notification: 25th August, 1986, vide notification No. G.S.R. 1035(E), dated 25th August, 1986, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The African Development Fund Act, 1982 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Payments to Fund. Section 4. Reserve Bank to be depository for Fund. Section 5. Conferment of status and certain immunities, exemptions and privileges on Fund and conferment of certain immunities, exemptions and privileges on its officers and employees. Section 6. Power to make rules. Section 7. Notifications issued under section 5 and rules made under section 6 to be laid before Parliament. Schedule 1.
